name: Auth Dependencies
description: FastAPI dependency injection functions for authentication. Provides user resolution from JWT session cookies with required and optional variants. Validates JWT tokens, queries database for user records, and raises HTTP 401 errors on authentication failures.

types.name: User
types.description: User model from backend.api.models with at least an 'id' field (UUID)

types.name: HTTPException
types.description: FastAPI HTTP exception with status_code and detail fields

functions.name: get_current_user
functions.description: Resolves the authenticated user from a JWT session cookie. Returns User on success, raises HTTPException(401) on any authentication failure (missing cookie, invalid JWT, user not found in database).

inputs.name: session
inputs.description: JWT token from session cookie, defaults to None if not present

error_cases.name: missing_session_cookie
error_cases.condition: session parameter is None or empty

error_cases.name: invalid_jwt_or_uuid
error_cases.condition: decode_jwt() raises exception OR uuid.UUID() conversion fails

error_cases.name: user_not_found
error_cases.condition: Database query returns None (no user with given UUID)

preconditions: session cookie must contain valid JWT
JWT payload must have 'sub' field containing valid UUID string
User with extracted UUID must exist in database
postconditions: Returns User object from database matching JWT subject
User.id matches UUID extracted from JWT 'sub' field
side_effects: Executes database SELECT query against User table

functions.name: get_optional_user
functions.description: Resolves the authenticated user from a JWT session cookie, returning None instead of raising errors. Returns User if authentication succeeds, None for any failure (missing cookie, invalid JWT, user not found).

inputs.name: session
inputs.description: JWT token from session cookie, defaults to None if not present

postconditions: Returns User object if session valid and user exists in database
Returns None if session missing, invalid, or user not found
side_effects: Executes database SELECT query against User table if session cookie present

structured_side_effects.description: Queries User table by id when session cookie present

invariants: All authentication failures in get_current_user result in HTTPException with status_code=401
User.id field matches JWT 'sub' claim when successfully authenticated
get_optional_user never raises exceptions, always returns User or None

data_access.rationale: Both functions query the User table to resolve authenticated users from JWT tokens. No writes occur.

side_effects.rationale: SELECT query filtering User by id extracted from JWT

authority.rationale: This module owns the authentication dependency injection pattern for FastAPI routes, determining authenticated user from session cookies
